attrval.name: Positioning
attrval.textval: High power paired with enhanced runtime

cltextval.clText2000: High power paired with enhanced runtime

attrval.name: Long version part 1
attrval.textval: The EXBA18V-55 high-power Expert battery delivers up to 2000W maximum power for demanding applications paired with enhanced runtime (based on internal lab testing; instantaneous maximum power with a fully charged, new battery). Its high-power cells are designed for exceptional performance, offering both superior power and outstanding energy density. With its reinforced robust housing and excellent thermal management from COOLPACK 2.0, the EXBA18V-55 offers a long lifetime and is therefore ideal for professionals who rely on durability and performance.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXBA18V-55 high-power Expert battery delivers up to 2000W maximum power for demanding applications paired with enhanced runtime (based on internal lab testing; instantaneous maximum power with a fully charged, new battery). Its high-power cells are designed for exceptional performance, offering both superior power and outstanding energy density. With its reinforced robust housing and excellent thermal management from COOLPACK 2.0, the EXBA18V-55 offers a long lifetime and is therefore ideal for professionals who rely on durability and performance.

attrval.name: Long version part 2
attrval.textval: The EXBA18V-55 has an extended charging temperature range from -10°C to +55°C battery temperature when used with EXAL18V2-320 and EXAL18V-160. It features a 5-LED indicator that displays state of charge, remaining capacity and defect risk detection. Compatible with the Bosch Professional 18V System and the multi-brand battery alliance AMPShare.

cltextval.clText2000: The EXBA18V-55 has an extended charging temperature range from -10°C to +55°C battery temperature when used with EXAL18V2-320 and EXAL18V-160. It features a 5-LED indicator that displays state of charge, remaining capacity and defect risk detection. Compatible with the Bosch Professional 18V System and the multi-brand battery alliance AMPShare.

attrval.name: Long version part 3
attrval.textval: It can be fully charged in only 31 minutes with the EXAL18V2-320 or EXAL18V-160, and weighs only 1.02kg.

cltextval.clText2000: It can be fully charged in only 31 minutes with the EXAL18V2-320 or EXAL18V-160, and weighs only 1.02kg.

attrval.name: User benefit incl. Reason to believe
attrval.textval: High power: Up to 2000W maximum power for demanding applications (based on internal test lab data, instantaneous maximum power, fully charged, new battery)
